description: Reference table containing country codes and names with organizational membership information (EU, EPO, OECD).

columns.name: continent
columns.description: Continent where the country is located.

columns.name: eu_member
columns.description: Flag or date indicating European Union membership status.

columns.name: oecd_member
columns.description: Flag or date indicating OECD membership status.

columns.name: discontinued
columns.description: Flag or date indicating if the country code is no longer in use (e.g., historical countries).

columns.name: organisation_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if the code represents an international organization rather than a country.

columns.name: epo_member
columns.description: Flag or date indicating European Patent Office membership status.
